meaning: vi.混时间,闲荡,涂鸦n.傻子,乱画(或乱写)之物
examples: The doodle is the latest in the recent rehabilitation of Confucius.
I often doodle when I'm on the phone.
One group was encouraged to doodle, but the other was not.
Unfortunately, the doodle, like the campaign, showed that Gore got technology, but he didn't get tech.
The doodle has over 300 versions unique to the United States and over 700 available internationally.
